data.body:
Scope expansion (2026-04-26, from docs/proposed-mitigations-4-26.md, conflict resolutions C1 + C2):

Two mitigations absorbed into this epic's PRECONDITIONS event log scope:

- **C1 → G3-M1 absorbed** — 'Graceful degradation' paths in skill prose write a PRECONDITIONS decisions_log entry with a degradation: true flag (rather than a separate degradation-receipt.json file as originally proposed in the mitigations doc). Single source of truth — the existing decisions_log mechanism (with evidence_ref, source_type, affects_fields) structurally captures degradation rationale. The completion-verifier and downstream consumers already read PRECONDITIONS, so receipt-checking is structurally available without a parallel channel.

  Suggested addition to SC2 (depth-tiered schema): standard tier's decisions_log entries support an optional degradation: bool field; minimal tier ignores it.

- **C2 → G3-M2 absorbed into SC4** — The sprint stage-boundary validator (story 92a6-52d6) explicitly fails when PRECONDITIONS contains unacknowledged degradation entries (decisions_log entries with degradation: true and no acknowledgment marker). Sprint cannot proceed past Phase 0 with unacknowledged degradations; user must explicitly acknowledge each before the next batch starts.

  Suggested addition to SC4: 'Sprint validator additionally checks for unacknowledged degradation entries in decisions_log; refuses progression until each is acknowledged via a structured ack mechanism (TBD in implementation plan).'

Rationale: G3-M1 originally prescribed a parallel file mechanism (degradation-receipt.json in the worktree). This conflict resolution absorbs the intent (external evidence of degradation that an agent cannot self-narrate) into the existing PRECONDITIONS event log. Same goal, no parallel channel. G3-M2 was originally a sprint Phase 0 check; absorbed into the sprint validator (story 92a6-52d6) as a sub-criterion of SC4.

Background: ticket 3dae-af1a (open, CLI_user-tagged) documents the agent self-attestation failure mode this epic prevents — agent skipped scrutiny pipeline by self-narrating a 'logged rationale.' External PRECONDITIONS state is the structural fix.

This epic has 7 children (a96b-7ba8, a497-ee7c, 86ad-f5e7, 92a6-52d6, 0263-62ba, 1e71-3886, ad8f-3a8a). Children likely need re-decomposition; the affected stories are a96b-7ba8 (writer adds degradation field), 92a6-52d6 (sprint validator gains degradation check), 86ad-f5e7 (schema adds degradation flag), and ad8f-3a8a (docs).
